name: Mix-in-The-Pan Lemon Poppy Seed Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix flour, granulated sugar, poppy seed, baking soda, and salt with a fork in an ungreased square pan (8x8x2 inches or 9x9x2 inches).
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients except powdered sugar.
4. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean and the top is golden brown.
5. Cool, then sprinkle with powdered sugar.
6. Serve with lemon sherbert if desired.
